module_info.docstring: SQLite-backed metadata store for entry provenance and citation tracking.

classes.name: MetadataStore
classes.docstring: SQLite store for entry provenance, citations, and audit checks.

methods.name: ensure_schema
methods.docstring: Create tables if they don't exist (idempotent).

methods.name: upsert_entry
methods.docstring: Insert or update an entry with atomic snapshot_count increment.

methods.name: record_citation
methods.docstring: Record an extracted citation for an entry (idempotent per entry+value).

methods.name: record_check
methods.docstring: Append a citation check to the audit log.

methods.name: update_confidence
methods.docstring:
Set confidence and derive status from threshold.

Preserves 'demoted' status — use reactivate_entry() for explicit re-promotion.
Auto-resets stale_streak on stale->active transition.

methods.name: get_stale_entries
methods.docstring: Return entries with confidence below the stale threshold.

methods.name: get_unchecked_citations
methods.docstring: Return citations needing validation, filtered to active entries only.

methods.name: get_entry
methods.docstring: Get full entry metadata by hash.

methods.name: begin_transaction
methods.docstring: Begin an explicit transaction.

methods.name: commit_transaction
methods.docstring: Commit the current transaction.

methods.name: rollback_transaction
methods.docstring: Roll back the current transaction.

methods.name: close
methods.docstring: Close the database connection.

methods.name: increment_stale_streak
methods.docstring: Increment stale_streak counter for consecutive stale sweeps.

methods.name: reset_stale_streak
methods.docstring: Reset stale_streak to 0 (entry recovered or was healthy during sweep).

methods.name: mark_demoted
methods.docstring: Mark entry as demoted (removed from target doc).

methods.name: reactivate_entry
methods.docstring: Reset a demoted entry to active status, clearing demotion markers.

methods.name: search_entries
methods.docstring:
Search entries by keyword in content_preview or section.

Supports multiple space-separated keywords (AND logic).
Uses parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection.

methods.name: get_topics
methods.docstring:
Return topic summary: section name, entry count, average confidence.

Includes active and stale entries, excludes demoted/orphaned.

methods.name: get_demoted_entries
methods.docstring: Return entries with demoted status.

methods.name: _migrate_to_v2
methods.docstring:
Add Phase 2A columns: stale_streak, demoted_at (idempotent).

Note: The CHECK constraint on status is only enforced for new DBs.
Existing DBs (created before Phase 2A) accept 'demoted' status but
don't have CHECK enforcement. This is acceptable because all status
updates go through MetadataStore methods, not raw SQL.
